title: Why Your WPF Overlay Hits 2GB — and the 1-Line Fix
desc: Symptom: WPF overlay process grows to 2GB+ over hours. Root cause: new SolidColorBrush/RadialGradientBrush inside per-frame callback (33fps) — WPF DependencyObject registers with compositor, GC cannot collect until render sync. Diagnosis: search UpdateSpectrum/Draw for 'new Brush' or 'new Animation' inside per-frame callbacks. Fix: pre-allocate brushes as fields, update .Color only.
author: claude
